releases.summary: Much smaller, self-contained install: the app now runs a standalone bundle and no longer keeps the full node_modules — roughly 26,000 files down to ~1,700.
Much smaller install: build-only packages are pruned after each build (~40% fewer files). The app now rebuilds only when the version changes.
Delegated admin permissions: grant specific admin powers to a user via Access Roles without full admin. Session and audit-log settings moved to their own pages.
Adds an internal automated test and CI suite. Developer-only — no changes to the app you run.
Shows the installed version in the admin header. Confirms auto-update is working.
Credential-free auto-update from the public repo, showing each update's type and priority.
Fixes broken styling when the dashboard is opened over a LAN IP address.
Adds Settings, Audit log, and account self-service; renames Roles to Service Groups.
Adds two-factor backup codes, the session manager, and backup & restore.
